goal: Implement minimal AgentOS kernel with CI/CD workflow, chat, logging, and replay capabilities.
constraints: Follow AGENTS.md instructions and dependency whitelist
Use established TypeScript, ESLint, and testing configuration
Limit core implementation to specified directories and files (<=10)
Episodes must persist to disk and support replay
Workflow must upload episodes and reports artifacts
Maintain compatibility with existing pnpm scripts

acceptance.then: Chat response is generated and episode file is written
Logged events are re-emitted in order
tests covering runLoop, EpisodeLogger, Replay pass
Steps pnpm setup/typecheck/lint/test/build/smoke succeed and artifacts uploaded

input.task: Design data structures and module interfaces for core/agent and runtime components

steps.expect: Implement run loop, event bus, episode logger, and replay
Build simple UI for chat and log display
Provide CLI entry supporting run and replay
Add lightweight tests or manual validation hooks if feasible

input.command: Create or update .github/workflows/ci.yml with required configuration

risks: Time constraints limit comprehensive test coverage
File count restriction complicates separation of concerns
Implementations might deviate from future design expectations
Integration with existing tooling may introduce complexity
Missing pnpm cache or install step causing workflow failure
Artifacts directories absent leading to upload errors
rollback: Revert to initial empty repository commit if architecture fails
Simplify run loop to sequential execution without planner updates
Remove new files and dependencies if approach invalid
Re-run pnpm install after adjusting configuration to resolve conflicts
Revert workflow file if pipeline misconfigured
